case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS POLON DIMITRY IND/DBA 1350 GUERRERO ST APTS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $353.12 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT POLON DIMITRY IND/DBA 1350 GUERRERO ST APTS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-14-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06 TRIAL OF MAY-08-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT POLON DIMITRY IND/DBA 1350 GUERRERO ST APTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLON DIMITRY IND/DBA 1350 GUERRERO ST APTS. $353.12 PRINCIPAL, $14.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $367.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT POLON DIMITRY IND/DBA 1350 GUERRERO ST APTS.
